item.description:
Professional Summary Link to heading

Data Scientist with six years of experience in machine learning and statistical modelling, with a focus on healthcare and public health sectors. Experienced in end-to-end model development with a proven track record of translating client needs into AI-driven solutions, including COVID-19 forecasting tools adopted by the Malaysian National Security Council to inform nationwide lockdown decisions. Strong communicator across technical and non-technical audiences (e.g., epidemiologists and policymakers) with experience mentoring and supporting team members.

item.title: About
item.description:
I’m Prateep, a London-based Data Scientist with a background in engineering. I completed my PhD in Plasma Physics and Electrical Engineering and my BEng in Electronics and Computer Systems Engineering at Loughborough University.

Contact Link to heading

You can contact me via email or LinkedIn.

Email: prateepkasinathan@gmail.com

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/p-kasinathan/
